pokemon:lampent.name: Lampent
pokemon:lampent.summary: It arrives near the moment of death and steals spirit from the body.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It arrives near the moment of death and steals spirit from the body.
This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.
The spirits it absorbs fuel its baleful fire. It hangs around hospitals waiting for people to pass on.
The spirits it absorbs fuel its baleful fire. It hangs around hospitals waiting for people to pass on.
It lurks in cities, pretending to be a lamp. Once it finds someone whose death is near, it will trail quietly after them.
This Pokémon appears just before someone passes away, so it’s feared as an emissary of death.
It arrives near the moment of death and steals spirit from the body.
The spirits it absorbs fuel its baleful fire. It hangs around hospitals waiting for people to pass on.
The spirits it absorbs fuel its baleful fire. It hangs around hospitals waiting for people to pass on.
It arrives near the moment of death and steals spirit from the body.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It arrives near the moment of death and steals spirit from the body.

pokemon:litwick.name: Litwick
pokemon:litwick.summary: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.
Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.
Its flame is usually out, but it starts shining when it absorbs life force from people or Pokémon.
While shining a light and pretending to be a guide, it leeches off the life force of any who follow it.
The younger the life this Pokémon absorbs, the brighter and eerier the flame on its head burns.
The flame on its head keeps its body slightly warm. This Pokémon takes lost children by the hand to guide them to the spirit world.
While shining a light and pretending to be a guide, it leeches off the life force of any who follow it.
Its flame is usually out, but it starts shining when it absorbs life force from people or Pokémon.
While shining a light and pretending to be a guide, it leeches off the life force of any who follow it.
Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.

pokemon:chandelure.name: Chandelure
pokemon:chandelure.summary: The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.
It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.
The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.
Being consumed in Chandelure’s flame burns up the spirit, leaving the body behind.
In homes illuminated by Chandelure instead of lights, funerals were a constant occurrence— or so it’s said.
This Pokémon haunts dilapidated mansions. It sways its arms to hypnotize opponents with the ominous dancing of its flames.
Being consumed in Chandelure’s flame burns up the spirit, leaving the body behind.
The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.
Being consumed in Chandelure’s flame burns up the spirit, leaving the body behind.
The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.
